sections.sectionTitle: Mailam Hunah Jerusalem A Suahtakna Ding

verses.text: Vanpi zalin leitung piangsak a, mihingte tungah nuntakna a pia Topa in Israel mite tawh kisai-in thu gen a
“Leenggahzu bangin Jerusalem khuapi ka bawl ding a, a kiima om minam dangte in a nek ciangin khamin a hoi ding uh hi. Jerusalem khuapi a umcih uh ciangin Judah gam khuapi dangte zong umcih ding uh hi

Tua hun hong tun' ciangin suangtumpi gik mahmah bangin Jerusalem khuapi ka bawl ding a, likkhiat a sawm minam khat peuhpeuh in liamlawh ding hi. Leitung minamdang khempeuh kipawlin Jerusalem a sim ding uh hi
Tua ni ciangin a sakolte uh ka lausak ding a, a sakol tung tuangte uh ka haisak ding hi. Ahi zongin Judah mite ka kem ding a, a galte uh' sakolte, a mit ka tawsak ding hi
Tua ciangin Judah minamte in, ‘Jerusalem-a a teng mite, Vanglian Topa ahi amau' Pasian' hangin thahat uh hi,’ ci ding uh hi

“Tua ni ciangin Judah minamte, tulak kang leh buhphual kang ka bangsak ding a, a kiima om minamdangte khempeuh a susia ding uh hi. Ahi zongin Jerusalem mite, a khuapi sungah lungmuangin a om hithiat ding uh hi
“Tua ciangin Judah galkapte tungah gualzawhna ka pia masa ding a, David' suanlekhakte leh Jerusalem khuamite' minthan'na pen Judah midangte' minthan'na sangin lianzaw tuanlo ding hi
Tua ni ciangin Topa in Jerusalem-a a teng mite hu ding a, a ginalo pente nangawn David zahin thahat ding hi. David' suanlekhakte in Topa' vantung mi leh Pasian mahmah bangin amaute a makai ding uh hi
Jerusalem sim ding a hanciam minam khempeuh tua ni ciangin ka susia ding hi

“David' suanlekhakte leh Jerusalem khuamite' tungah hehpihna lungsim leh thungetna lungsim ka guan' ding hi. Amaute in a sutlup uh mipa enin, ta khat neihsun a sihsuah mite bangin kap ding uh a, tacil a khuaisuahte bangin nakpi takin kapin thum ding uh hi
Tua hun laitakin Jerusalem khuasungah kapin thumna pen Megiddo zanglei-a Hadadrimmon pasian' sihna hangin kahna leh thumna zah mahin nasia ding hi

Gamsung khempeuhah a innkuankuanin dahin kap ding uh hi. David' suanlekhakte sung panin a innkuankuanin kapin, a zite uh zong a tuam mahin kap ding uh hi. Nathan' suanlekhakte zong a innkuankuanin kapin, a zite uh zong a tuam mahin kap ding uh hi
Levi' suanlekhakte leh a zite, Shimei' suanlekhakte leh a zite
leh beh dang khempeuhte zong a behbehin, a zite uh tawh a tuam ciatin kapin a thum ding uh hi.
